name: Hyrox Peak & Taper
goal: Event readiness for Hyrox on April 29. Maintain strength scores. Improve Zone 2 pace.

phases.name: Phase 1 — Build
phases.focus: Aerobic base, strength maintenance via Fitbod, leg priority

days.session: Squats, leg press, RDLs, hip thrust. 32 days since last leg session — priority. Score ≥60
Bench, OHP, rows, pull-ups. Keep score ≥62
30–40 min at 120–130 bpm. Log pace — this is your baseline
Rows, pull-ups, bench, OHP, curls
4 × 1km at race pace with 90-sec walk recovery between. Simulates run legs between stations. Log split per km and RPE
45–50 min at 120–130 bpm. HR control, not pace. True Zone 2 ~9:00–9:30/km
Second leg session — focus on posterior chain (RDLs, hamstring curls)

phases.name: Phase 2 — Sharpen
phases.focus: Race-specific intensity, one full simulation, leg strength maintained

days.session: Heavy — squats and sled-pattern movements. Protect score ≥60
35–40 min. Compare pace to Apr 8 baseline
Bench, OHP, rows, pull-ups. Moderate load — save legs for simulation. Not to failure
Full race format at 70%: 8 × (1km run + station) in sequence. Log total time and split per km. This is the key session of the program
Full recovery after simulation — do not train
Bodyweight or light load — goblet squats, RDLs, hip thrust. Keep score ≥60. No heavy loading
Bench, OHP, rows, pull-ups. Moderate load, not to failure

phases.name: Phase 3 — Taper
phases.focus: Arrive fresh. Cut volume ~30–40%, keep intensity. No new stimulus.

days.session: 20 min easy Zone 2. Shake out the legs
Walk through stations at 50% effort. Mental rehearsal
Full recovery
15 min: light sled, 10 wall balls, 200m ski erg. Just activation
Walk, stretch, eat well, sleep early
Final prep — kit, nutrition plan, travel if needed
Optional very light shakeout. No effort

station_reference.notes: Biggest energy cost — save something for this

notes: Between each station: 1km run. 8 stations = 8km total running.
